title: See Invis Guys
description: This mod allows you to see invis players
body:
# See Invis Guys

## Features
Allows you to see invisible players as opaque.

## Supported Versions
1.21.4, 1.21.8, 1.21.11

## ⚠️ Warning
Works on servers but can be unfair and may result in a ban. Use at your own risk.
